overview.hero_location_line: Sugar Hill Resort, St James, Barbados
overview.hero_statement: A grand private estate with sweeping sea views, rare seclusion, and the kind of effortless West Coast elegance that stays with you.
overview.display_address: Sugar Hill Resort, St James, Barbados
overview.map_address: Monkey Hill Villa 6947+XQ6, Ocean Ridge, Mount Standfast, Saint James Barbados

story.story_headline: One of Barbados' most extraordinary private villas, perfect for long stays, large gatherings, and total tranquility.
story.intro_paragraph_1: Set within the prestigious Sugar Hill Resort, Monkey Hill spans nearly two acres of lush tropical gardens and occupies a rare ridge-front position with sweeping Caribbean Sea views.
story.intro_paragraph_2: The main residence offers six beautifully appointed en-suite bedrooms, including a luxurious master suite and a junior master, while a detached two-bedroom guest cottage adds flexibility for extended family, teenagers, staff, or guests seeking additional privacy.
story.intro_paragraph_3: Expansive interiors, covered terraces, outdoor entertaining areas, and an infinity-edge pool all come together to create a villa that feels both grand and deeply welcoming.
story.expanded_paragraph_1: The villa sits on one of the few ridge-front lots in Sugar Hill, enjoying cooling sea breezes and uninterrupted Caribbean Sea views from nearly every room.
story.expanded_paragraph_2: Complementing the main house is a charming two-bedroom detached guest cottage, complete with its own living space and kitchenette, ideal for extended family, teenagers, or accompanying staff.
story.expanded_paragraph_3: The interiors are spacious and inviting, blending classic Caribbean architecture with refined finishes. Expansive living and dining areas flow seamlessly onto covered terraces and outdoor entertaining spaces.
story.expanded_paragraph_4: Outdoors, a stunning infinity-edge pool stretches toward the horizon, framed by manicured tropical gardens and sun-drenched terraces.
story.expanded_paragraph_5: As part of the exclusive Sugar Hill community, guests benefit from 24-hour security and access to premium estate amenities including tennis courts, fitness facilities, and a clubhouse.
story.expanded_paragraph_6: Grand yet welcoming, private yet perfectly positioned, Monkey Hill offers an elevated West Coast lifestyle for discerning travellers seeking space, views, and refined island living.
story.why_love_headline: A peaceful haven with breathtaking views.
story.natalie_paragraph_1: For me, Monkey Hill is one of the most beautiful expressions of Barbados living. Private, elevated, and beautifully positioned within Sugar Hill, it offers space, calm, and a remarkable sense of ease in one of the island's most desirable communities.
story.natalie_paragraph_2: Having lived and worked in Barbados for over a decade, I know how rare it is to find a home that feels both impressive and deeply easy to live in.

extras.contact_eyebrow: Plan Your Stay At Monkey Hill
extras.tax_note: All prices exclude tax. A 10% Barbados government tax and 2.5% service charge will be added to every rental price.
extras.security_deposit_note: A security deposit of US$2,000 will be required on or before arrival. Price subject to confirmation by property owner.
extras.booking_terms_1: Summer and Winter Payment terms: For bookings over the Summer and Winter period there is typically a 5 night minimum stay upwards. The deposit payable is 25% of the total rental price and the balance is due before 60 days of the arrival date.
extras.booking_terms_2: Christmas and New Year Pricing Information: Bookings over the Christmas and New Year period tend to have stricter payment terms and higher room rates than at other times of year. Typically bookings are subject to a 14 night minimum stay.
extras.booking_terms_3: All prices quoted above have been calculated based on information provided by the owners but are subject to confirmation during December and January.

bedroom_copy.layout_heading: Eight beautifully appointed rooms across the main house and private cottage.
bedroom_copy.layout_description: Six en-suite rooms sit within the main residence, while two additional bedrooms in the private guest cottage create a more flexible and beautifully balanced layout for families, friends, and extended stays.

areas.description: Three rooms placed for easy access to terraces, gardens, and the villa’s main living spaces.
Three elevated rooms arranged for privacy, views, and easy access across the main house.
Two additional bedrooms create a flexible cottage layout for extended family or guests seeking extra privacy.

reviews.title: Paradise
reviews.review: A fantastically positioned villa within Sugar Hill. The whole place was luxurious, clean and comfortable. Sonia our host was amazing, always there if we needed her.

reviews.title: AMAZING week at Monkey Hill
reviews.review: Thank you Monkey Hill, Sonia and Nikita for an unforgettable week! The photos do not do this villa justice, it is simply spectacular.

reviews.title: Family reunion
reviews.review: The Monkey Hill Estate was a dream come true for our family. The location, staff, living space, pool, and everything about it were absolutely perfect.

highlights.highlight: Stunning Caribbean Sea views from nearly every room
Resident green monkeys visit the gardens
Grand scale with genuine warmth - a real home
24-hour security in an exclusive gated community
The infinity pool at sunset is unforgettable
